headline: Grindr Nominates Three New Directors to Its Board of Directors
summary: WEST HOLLYWOOD, Calif., April 30, 2026--Grindr Inc. (NYSE: GRND), the Global Gayborhood in Your Pocket™, today announced the nomination of Rob Solomon, Lisa Gersh, and Fadi Hanna to stand for election to its Board of Directors at the Annual Meeting of Shareholders on June 2, 2026.
